segments.text: With that landing position being so low, the up smash won't connect—straight into a forward smash counterattack!
segments.original_text: この着地姿勢、当然姿勢とても低いので上スマッシュは当たらず、そのまま横スマッシュで反撃

segments.text: Going up B and continuing to build damage, but then forward smash takes the banana!
segments.original_text: 上Bとさらに火力を稼いでいって、だが横スマッシュでバナナ

full_text: With that landing position being so low, the up smash won't connect—straight into a forward smash counterattack! Going up B and continuing to build damage, but then forward smash takes the banana!

corrections.original: 上ヒストサーで火力をさらに稼いでいって
corrections.corrected: 上Bとさらに火力を稼いでいって
